testcase.name: SEC_001 Arm Stay
testcase.system-out:
================================================== Step: Check whether the Arm Status is Disarmed Result: Passed Duration: 1500 ms Message: Status check passed. Expected and actual status: Disarmed
================================================== Step: Check whether the Exit delay Status is Ready to Arm Result: Passed Duration: 800 ms Message: Exit delay status check passed. Expected and actual status: Ready to Arm
================================================== Step: Click Arm Stay Result: Passed Duration: 2930 ms Message: Arm stay action completed successfully.

testcase.name: SEC_002 Armed Stay Disarm
testcase.system-out:
================================================== Step: Check whether the Arm Status is Armed Stay Result: Passed Duration: 1200 ms Message: Status check passed. Expected and actual status: Armed Stay
================================================== Step: Enter user code to disarm Result: Passed Duration: 3650 ms Message: Disarm action completed successfully.

testcase.name: SEC_003 Arm Away
testcase.failure: Step: Wait for Status: Armed Away Action: Timeout reached. Desired status 'Armed Away' not achieved. Page: main Message: Timeout reached. Desired status 'Armed Away' not achieved.
testcase.system-out:
================================================== Step: Check whether the Arm Status is Disarmed Result: Passed Duration: 1300 ms Message: Status check passed. Expected and actual status: Disarmed
================================================== Step: Click Arm Away Result: Passed Duration: 3200 ms Message: Arm away action completed successfully.
================================================== Step: Wait for Status: Armed Away Result: Failed Duration: 1620 ms Message: Timeout reached. Desired status 'Armed Away' not achieved.

testcase.name: ZON_001 Zone Edit
testcase.system-out:
================================================== Step: Navigate to Zone Management page Result: Passed Duration: 2100 ms Message: Successfully navigated to Zone Management page.
================================================== Step: Select zone 1 for editing Result: Passed Duration: 1800 ms Message: Zone 1 selected successfully.
================================================== Step: Update zone name to 'Front Door' Result: Passed Duration: 2990 ms Message: Zone name updated successfully to 'Front Door'.

testcase.name: SET_001 Display Brightness
testcase.system-out:
================================================== Step: Navigate to System Settings Result: Passed Duration: 1500 ms Message: Successfully navigated to System Settings.
================================================== Step: Set brightness level to 50% Result: Passed Duration: 3950 ms Message: Brightness level set to 50% successfully.
